thought.text: 刚才命令有语法问题，我会重跑精简查询。

action.command:
printf '%s
' '--- task0 files for 056 ---'; find /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task0 -path '*056_short_circuit*' -type f -print | sed -n '1,20p'; f=$(find /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task0 -path '*056_short_circuit*' -type f | head -1); [ -n "$f" ] && sed -n '1,80p' "$f"; printf '%s
' '--- answer token names unique ---'; awk '{print $1}' /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/*/*/answer.txt | sort | uniq -c | sort -nr; printf '%s
' '--- token examples complex ---'; for f in /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/functional-1/023_op_priority1.sysu.c/answer.txt /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/functional-3/056_short_circuit.sysu.c/answer.txt /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/mini-performance/bitset.sysu.c/answer.txt; do echo ===$f===; sed -n '1,160p' "$f"; done

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "printf '%s\\n' '--- task0 files for 056 ---'; find /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task0 -path '*056_short_circuit*' -type f -print | sed -n '1,20p'; f=$(find /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task0 -path '*056_short_circuit*' -type f | head -1); [ -n \"$f\" ] && sed -n '1,80p' \"$f\"; printf '%s\\n' '--- answer token names unique ---'; awk '{print $1}' /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/*/*/answer.txt | sort | uniq -c | sort -nr; printf '%s\\n' '--- token examples complex ---'; for f in /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/functional-1/023_op_priority1.sysu.c/answer.txt /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/functional-3/056_short_circuit.sysu.c/answer.txt /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/mini-performance/bitset.sysu.c/answer.txt; do echo ===$f===; sed -n '1,160p' \"$f\"; done", "timeout": 120, "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Inspect task1 tokens and representative answers"}
